name: MHC_class3_chimpanzee
description: Pan troglodytes Patr class III complement/HSP. Chimpanzee-lineage MHC nomenclature uses 'Patr-' prefix (e.g. Patr-A, Patr-B, Patr-C). Trans-species polymorphism shared with human HLA; ape-specific paralog expansions and losses documented in Suntsova 2017 and T2T-ape 2024.

architecture.internal_structure: Ape MHC: extensive haplotype divergence, trans-species polymorphism, ape-lineage gene duplications (Patr-AL, Gogo-AL etc.).
